justification: The question pertains to forecasting the specific stock price movement of Brown & Brown, Inc. (BRO), which is a financial market instrument.
question:
Will BRO's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2025-03-16?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
